params.dx: Amount of coin i to send
params.i: Index of the input coin (0 or 1 for 2-pools)
params.min_dy: Minimum amount of coin j to receive (slippage guard)

exchange(int128,int128,uint256,uint256).notice: Swap dx of coin i for coin j.
